mapper.select:
/* wms-report-ibobhistorysearch-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbObHistorySearchLoc */ #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT X.IOTYPE , X.IBHDTYPE , X.CTKEY , A.CTNAME , X.OWKEY , B.OWNAME , X.ICKEY , C.ICNAME , X.LOGGRPCD , D.ICGRNAME , X.IN_QTY , X.STOCK_QTY , X.OUT_QTY , SUBSTR(X.IBCONFIRMDATE, 1, 8) AS IBCONFIRMDATE_IBOB , X.IBCONFIRMDATE , X.IVATKEY , X.ATTRIBUTE3 , X.PRODUCTLOT , X.SPEC , X.UOM , X.PRODUCTDATE , X.EXPIREDATE , X.IBEXPECTDATE , X.ATTRIBUTE7 , X.LCKEY , E.ARKEY , F.ARNAME , G.ZNNAME
ORDER BY X.IVATKEY, X.IOTYPE #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
mapper.sql:
SELECT X.* FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN IOTYPE = 'IB' THEN '입고' ELSE '출고' END AS IOGB, CASE WHEN IOTYPE = 'IB' AND IBHDTYPE = '10' THEN '일반입고' WHEN IOTYPE = 'IB' AND IBHDTYPE = '40' THEN '보세입고' WHEN IOTYPE = 'IB' AND IBHDTYPE = '180' THEN '기타입고' WHEN IOTYPE = 'IB' AND IBHDTYPE = '190' THEN '화주변경입고' WHEN IOTYPE = 'IB' AND IBHDTYPE = '50' THEN '반품입고' WHEN IOTYPE = 'OB' AND IBHDTYPE = '10' THEN '일반출고' WHEN IOTYPE = 'OB' AND IBHDTYPE = '180' THEN '기타출고' WHEN IOTYPE = 'OB' AND IBHDTYPE = '450' THEN '화주변경출고' WHEN IOTYPE = 'OB' AND IBHDTYPE = '120' THEN '폐기출고(일반)' WHEN IOTYPE = 'OB' AND IBHDTYPE = '430' THEN '폐기출고(보세)' WHEN IOTYPE = 'OB' AND IBHDTYPE = '626' THEN '검역샘플출고(보세)' ELSE IBHDTYPE END AS IOBHDTYPE_KOR ,IOTYPE ,IBHDTYPE ,CTKEY ,OWKEY ,(SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW WHERE OWKEY=A.OWKEY) AS OWNAME ,ICKEY ,(SELECT ICNAME FROM TWORK_MST_IC WHERE CTKEY=A.CTKEY AND OWKEY=A.OWKEY AND ICKEY=A.ICKEY) AS ICNAME ,CASE WHEN A.LOGGRPCD = '5' THEN '정온' WHEN A.LOGGRPCD = '4' THEN '초저온' WHEN A.LOGGRPCD = '3' THEN '냉동' WHEN A.LOGGRPCD = '2' THEN '냉장' WHEN A.LOGGRPCD = '1' THEN '상온' ELSE A.LOGGRPCD END AS LOGGRPCD ,(SELECT ICGRNAME FROM TWORK_MST_ICGR WHERE CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY= A.OWKEY AND ICGRKEY = A.ICGRKEY) AS ICGRNAME ,IN_QTY ,OUT_QTY ,SUBSTR(IBCONFIRMDATE,1,8) AS IBCONFIRMDATE_IBOB ,IBCONFIRMDATE ,IVATKEY ,ATTRIBUTE3 ,PRODUCTLOT ,SPEC ,UOM ,PRODUCTDATE ,EXPIREDATE ,IBEXPECTDATE ,ATTRIBUTE7 ,LCKEY FROM ( SELECT 'IB' AS IOTYPE, TO1.CTKEY, TO1.OWKEY, TO1.ICKEY, TO1.IVATKEY, TO1.LOGGRPCD, TO1.ICGRKEY, TO1.IBHDTYPE, TO1.IBCONFIRMDATE, TO1.CFQTY IN_QTY , 0 OUT_QTY, TO1.ATTRIBUTE3, TO1.PRODUCTLOT, TO1.SPEC, TO1.UOM, TO1.PRODUCTDATE, TO1.EXPIREDATE, TO1.IBEXPECTDATE, TO1.ATTRIBUTE7, TO1.LCKEY FROM ( SELECT T1.CTKEY, T1.OWKEY, T1.ICKEY, T1.IVATKEY, T1.LOGGRPCD, T1.ICGRKEY,T1.IBHDTYPE, T1.IBCONFIRMDATE, SUM(T1.CFQTY) AS CFQTY, T1.ATTRIBUTE3, T1.PRODUCTLOT, T1.SPEC, T1.UOM, T1.PRODUCTDATE, T1.EXPIREDATE, T1.IBEXPECTDATE,T1.ATTRIBUTE7, T1.LCKEY FROM ( SELECT B.CTKEY, B.OWKEY, C.ICKEY, F.IVATKEY, E.LOGGRPCD, E.ICGRKEY, B.IBHDTYPE, COALESCE(CAST(D.CFQTY AS NUMERIC), 0) AS CFQTY, F.IBCONFIRMDATE, F.ATTRIBUTE3, F.PRODUCTLOT, E.SPEC, C.UOM, F.PRODUCTDATE, F.EXPIREDATE, B.IBEXPECTDATE, F.ATTRIBUTE7, C.TO_LCKEY AS LCKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD B ,TWORK_INFO_IB_DT C ,TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT D ,TWORK_MST_IC E ,TWORK_INFO_IVAT F WHERE B.CTKEY = '100' AND B.IBHDTYPE IN ('10','40') AND C.WKSTATUS IN ('90', '91') AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.IBHDKEY = C.IBHDKEY AND C.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND C.EXTERNORDERKEY = D.EXTERNORDERKEY AND C.EXTERNORDERLINENUM = D.EXTERNORDERLINENUM AND C.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND C.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND C.ICKEY = E.ICKEY AND C.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND C.ICKEY = F.ICKEY AND D.TO_IVATKEY = F.IVATKEY UNION ALL SELECT B.CTKEY, B.OWKEY, C.ICKEY, F.IVATKEY AS IVATKEY, D.LOGGRPCD, D.ICGRKEY, B.IBHDTYPE, COALESCE(C.CFQTY, 0) AS CFQTY, F.IBCONFIRMDATE, F.ATTRIBUTE3, F.PRODUCTLOT, D.SPEC, D.UOM, F.PRODUCTDATE, F.EXPIREDATE, B.IBEXPECTDATE, F.ATTRIBUTE7, C.TO_LCKEY AS LCKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD B ,TWORK_INFO_IB_DT C ,TWORK_MST_IC D ,TWORK_INFO_IVAT F WHERE B.CTKEY = '100' AND B.IBHDTYPE NOT IN ('10','40') AND C.WKSTATUS IN ('90', '91') AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.IBHDKEY = C.IBHDKEY AND C.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND C.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND C.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND B.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND C.ICKEY = F.ICKEY AND C.TO_IVATKEY = F.IVATKEY ) T1 GROUP BY T1.CTKEY, T1.OWKEY, T1.ICKEY, T1.IVATKEY, T1.LOGGRPCD, T1.ICGRKEY, T1.IBHDTYPE, T1.IBCONFIRMDATE, T1.ATTRIBUTE3, T1.PRODUCTLOT, T1.SPEC, T1.UOM, T1.PRODUCTDATE, T1.EXPIREDATE, T1.IBEXPECTDATE, T1.ATTRIBUTE7, T1.LCKEY ) TO1 UNION ALL SELECT 'OB' AS IOTYPE, T1.CTKEY, T1.OWKEY, T1.ICKEY, T1.IVATKEY, T1.LOGGRPCD, T1.ICGRKEY, T1.OBHDTYPE, T1.OBCONFIRMDATE, 0 IN_QTY ,SUM(T1.CFQTY) AS OUT_QTY, T1.ATTRIBUTE3, T1.PRODUCTLOT, T1.SPEC, T1.UOM, T1.PRODUCTDATE, T1.EXPIREDATE, T1.OBREQUESTDATE, T1.ATTRIBUTE7, T1.LCKEY FROM ( SELECT A.CTKEY, A.OWKEY, B.ICKEY, F.IVATKEY, C.LOGGRPCD, C.ICGRKEY ,A.OBHDTYPE ,COALESCE(D.CFQTY, 0) AS CFQTY, E.OBCONFIRMDATE, F.ATTRIBUTE3, F.PRODUCTLOT, C.SPEC, B.UOM, F.PRODUCTDATE, F.EXPIREDATE, A.OBREQUESTDATE , F.ATTRIBUTE7, D.LCKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT B ,TWORK_MST_IC C ,TWORK_INFO_PI_DT D ,TWORK_INFO_WAVE_DT E ,TWORK_INFO_IVAT F WHERE 1=1 AND A.CTKEY = '100' AND B.WKSTATUS IN ('90', '91') AND A.OBHDTYPE = '10' AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.OBHDKEY = B.OBHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND B.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = D.OBHDKEY AND B.OBDTKEY = D.OBDTKEY AND D.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND D.WAKEY = E.WAKEY AND B.EXTERNORDERKEY = E.EXTERNORDERKEY AND B.EXTERNORDERLINENUM = E.EXTERNORDERLINENUM AND A.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND B.ICKEY = F.ICKEY AND D.IVATKEY = F.IVATKEY UNION ALL SELECT A.CTKEY, A.OWKEY, B.ICKEY, F.IVATKEY, C.LOGGRPCD, C.ICGRKEY, A.OBHDTYPE, COALESCE(D.CFQTY, 0) AS CFQTY, B.OBCONFIRMDATE, F.ATTRIBUTE3, F.PRODUCTLOT, C.SPEC, B.UOM, F.PRODUCTDATE, F.EXPIREDATE, A.OBREQUESTDATE, F.ATTRIBUTE7, D.LCKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT B ,TWORK_MST_IC C ,TWORK_INFO_PI_DT D ,TWORK_INFO_IVAT F WHERE 1=1 AND A.CTKEY = '100' AND B.WKSTATUS IN ('90', '91') AND A.OBHDTYPE != '10' AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.OBHDKEY = B.OBHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND B.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = D.OBHDKEY AND B.OBDTKEY = D.OBDTKEY AND A.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND B.ICKEY = F.ICKEY AND D.IVATKEY = F.IVATKEY ) T1 GROUP BY T1.CTKEY, T1.OWKEY ,T1.ICKEY ,T1.IVATKEY ,T1.LOGGRPCD ,T1.ICGRKEY,T1.OBHDTYPE, T1.OBCONFIRMDATE, T1.ATTRIBUTE3, T1.PRODUCTLOT, T1.SPEC, T1.UOM, T1.PRODUCTDATE, T1.EXPIREDATE, T1.OBREQUESTDATE, T1.ATTRIBUTE7, T1.LCKEY ) A ) X WHERE X.CTKEY = #{ctkey}
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(IN_QTY) AS IN_QTY, SUM(STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY, SUM(OUT_QTY) AS OUT_QTY
